title: Mixed Review Bundle Response
prompt: Read `./mixed-review-bundle.md`, `./reassignment-change-summary.md`, and `./reassignment-test-summary.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the author-side review response record for this feedback bundle. Be explicit about what to accept, what to clarify, and what to push back on technically.

assertions.name: clarifies-ambiguous-feedback
assertions.description: Ambiguous feedback is not partially implemented without clarification.

assertions.name: verifies-against-scope
assertions.description: Accepted and rejected items are tied to current code and scope.

assertions.name: pushback-is-technical
assertions.description: Incorrect or scope-breaking feedback receives evidence-based pushback.

assertions.name: response-record-is-explicit
assertions.description: The output keeps an item-by-item response trail.
